use_cases: Persistent contact button for customer consultation across any web application
Quick access CTA for users seeking support or service inquiries
Conversion-focused button for capturing potential leads on landing pages
Always-visible assistance trigger for e-commerce product questions
Appointment booking trigger for service-based businesses
ai_summary: A floating consultation button component built with shadcn/ui and Radix UI primitives. The component uses class-variance-authority for flexible variant styling and appears persistently over page content. Features standard button variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) with size options. Designed as a persistent call-to-action element for driving user engagement and consultation requests.
